query: UPDATE clientes SET cpfCnpj = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') WHERE cpfCnpj LIKE '%.%' OR cpfCnpj LIKE '%-%' OR cpfCnpj LIKE '%/%';
